title: Luffy Returns From the Mirror World
description: On pages 14–14, this part focuses on Judge, Unknown person #13, Reiju, Sanji, Big Mom as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They were supposed to have been wiped out hours ago!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thanks for taking care of us during the tea party...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 17 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
